name: Vincenzo Zucchi S.p.A.
summary: Vincenzo Zucchi S.p.A. produces and sells household linen products in Italy and France. The company offers bedroom products, including sheets, duvet covers, duvet cover sets, fitted sheets, flat sheets, pillowcases, quilts, quilted bedspreads, sheet sets, and synthetic duvets; bathroom products, such as bath towels, bathrobes, bathroom rugs, and beach towels; living room products comprising blankets, decorative pillows and throws, pillow covers, and sofa covers; and kitchen products consisting of aprons, kitchen towels, loose napkins, oven mitts, placemats, pot holders, and runners. The company was founded in 1920 and is headquartered in Rescaldina, Italy.
